stories.title: Portugal and Colombia play to a draw in final grou...
Mercury's Tibbetts rips WNBA after Thomas ruling
stories.summary: Phoenix Mercury coach Nate Tibbetts called out the WNBA and defended his star player, Alyssa Thomas, ahead of the team's matchup against the Toronto Tempo on Saturday, days after Thomas was suspended for a play involving Indiana Fever guard Caitlin Clark.

stories.title: Aiyuk blames ex-agent for causing 49ers issues
stories.summary: Brandon Aiyuk said in a YouTube video that his former agent has influenced the ongoing situation between him and 49ers and that general manager John Lynch recently showed up at his house.

stories.title: Magic waive Jonathan Isaac, saving $6.5 million
stories.summary: The Magic on Saturday waived forward Jonathan Isaac, which will save Orlando $6.5 million, according to ESPN's Bobby Marks.

stories.title: Bills will not honor O.J. Simpson at new stadium
stories.summary: The Buffalo Bills will not honor former running back O.J. Simpson among the franchise's legends at their new stadium, the team announced.
